title: Grenfell Tower site update: Environmental monitoring
body: "The government recognises that Grenfell Tower has a deep personal significance to those most affected by the tragedy and that all work at the Grenfell Tower site is sensitive. We are continuing to share information about the Tower, and listen to bereaved families, survivors and residents in the immediate community.   In this community update, we provide information about how we will monitor and manage air quality, noise, and traffic as we carefully take down Grenfell Tower.  The content of this update reflects information that has been sent directly to bereaved family members, survivors and residents in the immediate community.  See information on how Grenfell Tower will be carefully taken down. "
